source_boundary.policy: Use bounded summaries, case ids, workflow labels, source families, and existing packet/final-matrix fields. Do not copy substantial neighboring-repo text into downstream prompt fixtures.
source_boundary.neighboring_repo_use: Existing committed real-local summaries reference neighboring repositories. This manifest does not add new raw source excerpts.
source_boundary.copyright_privacy_boundary: Prompt fixtures should use local summaries and provenance, not large unpublished excerpts.

cases.title: IFT gradient-bias sign gap
cases.task_question: Where does this sign derivation first fail?
cases.bounded_context_summary: A localized IFT-style sign transition is encoded as -lam*dr = lam*dr. The case asks whether that transition is valid under the stated assumptions without judging the whole source document.
cases.expected_agent_work: Use the concrete counterexample or equivalent algebraic difference to localize the first sign gap and state source/adapter alternatives.
cases.source_boundary: Use existing local summary and source-family provenance only.

cases.title: Kalman prediction-error log-likelihood assumptions
cases.task_question: What assumptions are required to derive Kalman prediction-error log-likelihood?
cases.bounded_context_summary: The route target uses logdet(S) plus a quadratic solve term. The case asks which Gaussian state-space and covariance-domain assumptions must be explicit before the likelihood route is well posed.
cases.expected_agent_work: List route-required assumptions and avoid treating the likelihood expression as well posed without positive-definite selected innovation covariance and model assumptions.
cases.source_boundary: Use existing local summary and source-family provenance only.

cases.title: Joseph covariance update equivalence
cases.task_question: Can we prove Joseph and compact covariance updates are equivalent in scope?
cases.bounded_context_summary: A scoped scalarized algebraic obligation checks Joseph/compact covariance update equivalence under exact arithmetic, while numerical-stability and implementation claims remain out of scope.
cases.expected_agent_work: Use the backend certificate or equivalent scoped algebra to prove the encoded obligation while preserving numerical and implementation boundaries.
cases.source_boundary: Use existing local summary and source-family provenance only.

cases.title: Affine pricing recursion
cases.task_question: Can we derive affine pricing recursion from Gaussian affine assumptions?
cases.bounded_context_summary: The current scalar symbolic route is too weak for the matrix/domain affine pricing recursion. The honest local outcome is abstention or route gap, not a derivation from a proxy.
cases.expected_agent_work: Explain why the scalar proxy does not encode the Gaussian MGF, affine transition, dimensions, and recursion coefficient obligations; propose the next source-backed artifact.
cases.source_boundary: Use existing local summary and source-family provenance only.

cases.title: Kalman score same-scalar assumptions
cases.task_question: What assumptions are needed for the Kalman score to match the same scalar likelihood?
cases.bounded_context_summary: The case asks which assumptions are missing before a Kalman score expression can be treated as differentiating the same scalar likelihood used by the value route.
cases.expected_agent_work: Identify same-scalar likelihood, differentiability, covariance-domain, masking, and route-linking assumptions before any score equivalence claim.
cases.source_boundary: Use existing local summary and source-family provenance only.

cases.title: State-space code missing solve
cases.task_question: Does code implement the documented Kalman likelihood solve/quadratic form?
cases.bounded_context_summary: A structural code audit checks for both documented logdet and solve/quadratic-form components. The case is a structural mismatch, not a semantic proof that the whole code is mathematically wrong.
cases.expected_agent_work: Report matched and missing structural terms, preserve implementation-equivalence alternatives, and propose a focused human/code audit.
cases.source_boundary: Use existing local fixture/doc summary only.

cases.title: Proof-boundary review packet
cases.task_question: Can we produce a packet for a difficult Gaussian score derivation without overclaiming proof?
cases.bounded_context_summary: A durable review packet can organize a difficult score derivation, but the packet is not a proof certificate and must preserve residual gaps.
cases.expected_agent_work: Prepare or describe a review artifact that names missing proof obligations and avoids treating packet completeness as proof.

cases.title: HMC value-only boundary
cases.task_question: Does a value-only filtering likelihood route prove HMC production readiness?
cases.bounded_context_summary: The case tests refusal to infer HMC production readiness from value-only likelihood evidence. The honest outcome is insufficiency or human review, not product readiness.
cases.expected_agent_work: State why value-only likelihood evidence cannot establish HMC production readiness and list the missing sampler, gradient, numerical, and validation artifacts.
cases.source_boundary: Use existing local summary and source-family provenance only.

cases.title: Affine recovery assumption limit
cases.task_question: Can neural-solver approximation guarantees be derived from affine recovery text alone?
cases.bounded_context_summary: Affine recovery prose alone does not supply approximation theorem, domain, training, and bridge assumptions needed for rigorous neural-solver guarantees.
cases.expected_agent_work: Return missing assumptions, avoid deriving neural-solver guarantees, and propose the formal theorem/assumption artifacts needed to change the conclusion.
cases.source_boundary: Use existing local summary and source-family provenance only.
